result.summary: Found 2 visually broken layout issues: content is clipped off the right edge in the category row and in the game grids, making some items partially inaccessible.

issues.description: The top category navigation is cut off on the right, with the last tab only partially visible ('Hot Gam').
issues.suggestion: Adjust the horizontal spacing, container width, or scrolling behavior so the full tab is visible or clearly scrollable without appearing clipped.

issues.description: Several game tiles on the right side of the content sections are partially cut off by the viewport, indicating overflow/clipping in the grid layout.
issues.suggestion: Fix the grid or carousel sizing so cards fit cleanly within the screen bounds, or provide proper horizontal scrolling with visible affordances.
